## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Managing Director role at GrowthX with candidate William Leborgne](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [William has extensive content/SEO leadership experience and AI workflow expertise, aligning well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly scaling (2 new clients/week) and seeking directors who can balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Role involves managing \~15 accounts, leading pod of strategists/editors, and helping shape GrowthX's expanding service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Cultural fit seems strong - William's enthusiasm for AI/experimentation matches GrowthX's innovative, fast-paced environment](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [Currently dual role at AeroDNA (data for short-term rentals) and Uplisting (property management tool)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Significant content/SEO leadership experience (e.g. grew AeroDNA blog 328%)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Launched own boutique agency in 2023 (clients included Credit Karma, TikTok)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Certified Aero content engineer; built 20+ AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Trilingual (English, French, Spanish) with international growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### Managing Director Role Overview

  - [Own \~15 accounts, lead pod of strategists and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Balance strategic thinking with ability to execute hands-on when needed](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Help shape GrowthX's expanding service offerings beyond core content/SEO](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [Manage client relationships while improving internal processes/product](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Focus on efficiency, team management, and scaling production (5-50 pieces/week/client)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### GrowthX Company Culture & Growth

  - [Founders (Marcel, Daniel) balance visionary thinking with pragmatic execution](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)
  - [Rapid growth - onboarding 2 new clients/week, hiring quickly but thoughtfully](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Evolving from agency model to SaaS product (Atlas) with tiered service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [International expansion potential, though not immediate focus](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Emphasis on experimentation, getting quick signals, pivoting strategies as needed](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### Management Approach

  - [William's style: Create systems/SOPs, daily huddles, bi-weekly sprints, focus on unblocking team](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Andi (interviewer) emphasizes transparency across pods, laissez-faire with experienced directors](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)
  - [GrowthX aiming to standardize processes while maintaining flexibility for custom client work](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)

### Challenges & Opportunities

  - [Capacity planning amid rapid growth - balancing new clients, hiring, and product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Developing replicable processes for custom offerings (e.g. newsletters, expert-led content)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [Improving efficiency of thought leadership content creation (e.g. speech-to-text pipelines)](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)
  - [Expanding service offerings beyond core content/SEO strengths](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)

## Next Steps

  - [William to proceed to next interview round](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=2912.0)

  - [Consider William's international/language skills for potential future expansion](https://fathom.video/share/VbskfUS-upHEenehT3iQfweX5H8tJ5zu?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
